title: Job Opportunity: Internal Auditor for Mental Health Facility Operations (Non-Clinical Staff)
description:
We are actively looking for a highly organized and experienced Internal Auditor to evaluate the day-to-day operations of our non-clinical staff in a high-volume mental healthcare setting. This position focuses on auditing administrative activities—not provider documentation or clinical decisions.



Key Responsibilities:

 • Audit employee workflows related to insurance verification, billing, intake coordination, scheduling, and general front/back-office processes.

 • Evaluate productivity metrics across departments to assess performance trends and team efficiency.

 • Identify discrepancies, gaps in process adherence, or workflow breakdowns that may affect compliance or revenue cycle integrity.

 • Review and report on timeliness, accuracy, and completeness of non-clinical documentation and staff interactions with EHR or billing systems.

 • Collaborate with management and QA leadership to present findings, highlight risks, and recommend improvements or corrective action plans.



Ideal Candidate:

 • Has hands-on experience auditing mental health facility operations, especially in areas such as billing, insurance verification, intake, or administrative compliance.

 • Understands payer guidelines, authorization protocols, and documentation standards for non-clinical roles in behavioral health.

 • Is data-driven, highly detail-oriented, and able to navigate EHRs and internal systems with ease.

 • Can objectively assess individual and team performance and communicate findings in a clear, constructive way.



Preferred Qualifications:

 • Prior auditing or quality assurance experience in a behavioral health or medical office setting.

 • Knowledge of HIPAA, VOBs (Verification of Benefits), patient intake processes, and insurance follow-ups.

 • Familiarity with productivity KPIs and reporting in healthcare administration.



What You Can Expect:



You’ll be part of a mission-driven team working to ensure our behind-the-scenes operations support the best possible patient experience. This role plays a key part in protecting revenue integrity and improving staff accountability—without being involved in patient care or provider oversight.

title: GoHighLevel Expert
description:
Role Overview

We are seeking a dedicated GoHighLevel Expert to become the operational backbone of our marketing agency. You will be responsible for building, managing, and optimizing our clients' GHL accounts, ensuring everything runs smoothly from lead capture to client retention. If you live and breathe GoHighLevel and want to take ownership of agency fulfillment, this role is for you.

Additionally, you will independently follow Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs), embed GHL forms into clients' external websites, and create draft Google Ad campaigns to support client acquisition.



You will also have to liase with clients from the UK and USA so excellent english is a must.

title: Marketing Assistant
description:
Role Overview

We are looking for a proactive Marketing Assistant to support our agency's daily operations and client fulfillment. You will be hands-on with our tech stack, primarily GoHighLevel, helping us execute marketing strategies, build campaigns, and manage client assets. This is perfect for someone who is highly organized, tech-savvy, and ready to execute marketing tasks flawlessly.

You will be responsible for a wide range of technical and operational tasks within GoHighLevel and related platforms. This includes building workflows and automations for SMS and

You will manage basic CRM setups and sales pipelines, handle integrations for LC Phone, Twilio, and WhatsApp, and connect domains through providers like GoDaddy. title: AI Mockup Designer – Storefront Signage (Lovart / AI Rendering / Mockups)
description:
Overview



We are a signage company that designs and installs 3D LED storefront signs for businesses. Before producing a sign, we send potential clients a realistic AI-generated mockup showing how their new logo signage could look on their storefront.



We are looking for a detail-oriented AI Mockup Designer who can create clean, realistic storefront renderings with 3D signage using AI tools such as Lovart and other image generation tools.



Your job is to take a real storefront image and a logo and generate sales-ready visualizations of how a new 3D sign could look on the building.



This is not graphic design only — the key skill is creating convincing architectural mockups using AI rendering tools.







Your Responsibilities



You will receive:



• A real storefront photo

• A company logo

• Instructions about the signage



Your job is to:



Recreate the storefront as a clean rendering-style image



Generate 3D sign versions from the logo



Place the signs onto the storefront realistically



Produce multiple sign variations (day & night versions)



Ensure the mockups look professional and realistic enough to show clients







Example of Work



Typical output includes:



• realistic storefront mockups

• front-lit 3D channel letter signs

• day and night lighting versions

• accurate logo proportions

• realistic shadows and mounting



The final result must look like a real installed sign.







Tools



Preferred tools:



• Lovart AI

• ChatGPT (for prompt refinement)

• Photoshop / Photo editing software

• Vector software (Illustrator or similar)







Requirements



You must:



• Be experienced with AI image generation

• Be able to write or refine prompts

• Understand basic perspective and lighting

• Have strong attention to detail

• Follow clear instructions precisely

• Organize files properly



Experience with signage, architectural visualization, or product rendering is a plus.







Output Requirements



For each project you will produce:



• multiple storefront mockups

• day and night lighting versions

• different signage styles

• a vector file of the sign layout with dimensions







Important



Accuracy matters.



Logos must match exactly.

Signs must look realistically mounted.



These images will be shown directly to potential customers.

title: Mid/Senior Wordpress Developer (PHP/JS/CSS)
description:
We're an established Digital Marketing Agency based in Denver, Colorado and looking to expand our development team. We’re looking for an experienced WordPress developer to join our team on a full-time basis.



The role will involve working across a range of WordPress websites, handling both frontend and backend development. Day-to-day work will include fixing bugs, making updates, building new pages, improving existing layouts, and helping with the build of full websites when needed.



You’ll need to be comfortable working with PHP, JavaScript and CSS, as well as WordPress themes, plugins and page builders. We’re looking for someone who can troubleshoot issues properly, communicate clearly, and work reliably during our core hours of 8:30am to 4:30pm Mountain Time (Denver).



Requirements

- Strong applied experience working on the Wordpress platform

- Good working knowledge of PHP, JavaScript and CSS

- Confident working on both frontend and backend tasks

- Able to fix bugs and troubleshoot issues across themes, plugins and custom functionality

- Comfortable building pages and full websites in WordPress

- Experience with page builders, particularly Divi, Elementor and Bricks

- Strong communication skills

- Reliable internet connection

- Able to work 8:30am to 4:30pm Mountain Time (Denver)

- Organised, dependable and able to manage workload properly



Advantageous Skills

- Experience working on other platforms such as Webflow, Squarespace, Shopify and Django

- WooCommerce experience

- Experience working across multiple client websites

- Pagespeed Optimization





Salary is upto $2000/m dependant on experience, shortlisted applications will need to complete an interview and a paid test.

title: Customer Service Specialist
description:
We’re Hiring: Customer Service Specialist (Remote, Long-Term)



Now on our fifth round of hiring — only apply if you’re truly ready to put in the work.



We’re looking for a resilient, resourceful, and hardworking Customer Service Specialist to join our team for the long term. This is a remote position that requires availability during U.S. daytime hours — which means graveyard shifts for those based in the Philippines.



Key Responsibilities:

• Respond promptly and professionally to customer inquiries

• Solve problems independently and take initiative with minimal supervision

• Use online and internal resources effectively to assist customers and find accurate information

• Follow detailed instructions with a high level of accuracy

• Adapt quickly to new processes, updates, and team instructions — often daily



What to Expect:

Our internal systems are extremely manual, and precise data entry is essential to avoid errors. The work is fast-paced, with frequent changes and updates.



If you're easily overwhelmed, this role is not for you. But if you're the kind of person who thrives under pressure, stays organized amidst change, and takes full ownership of your work — keep reading.



Who We’re Looking For:

You:

• Have excellent written English — polished grammar, spelling, and a warm yet professional tone

• Can confidently work with limited instructions and find solutions without being hand-held

• Are self-motivated, follow processes closely, and take initiative when things aren’t clear

• Stay calm and effective under pressure, even with changing priorities or unexpected issues

• Have grit, discipline, and a genuine desire to do meaningful work — even when it’s tedious

• Are tech-savvy, or at least resourceful enough to learn any tool you're unfamiliar with

• Have strong attention to detail and can spot inconsistencies before they become problems



We care more about work ethic and integrity than degrees or certifications. If you're here just to coast or follow scripts without thinking — this isn’t the job for you.



Our Hiring Process:

We’ve created a set of customer service challenges based on scenarios you’ll handle in this role. These are meant to assess your writing, attention to detail, and problem-solving skills.



We’ll be selecting the strongest candidate who completes the challenges successfully.



Think you’re a good fit?



If you’re reliable, detail-oriented, and take pride in doing your work well, we’d love to hear from you. Apply now.

This role is not for a hands-on developer, but it does require someone who understands how development projects work and can manage them confidently.



We’re looking for someone who is extremely organised, proactive, detail-oriented, and confident using tools like Asana and Slack. Clear communication is essential, along with the ability to keep multiple moving parts under control without things slipping.



Requirements

Strong experience managing development or digital project workflows

Very organised and able to manage multiple projects at once

Experienced using Asana, Slack, and similar project management tools

Able to assign work clearly and keep developers accountable

Good understanding of web development processes and terminology

Able to communicate confidently with developers and non-technical tea
mbers

Strong attention to detail

Able to prioritise tasks and manage deadlines properly

Reliable internet connection

Able to work 8:30am to 4:30pm Mountain Time (Denver)

Dependable, proactive and good at keeping things moving



Nice to have

Experience working in a digital agency environment

Familiarity with WordPress, Shopify, Webflow, Squarespace, or other website platforms

Experience working with designers, developers and marketing teams together

Experience helping scope projects or review requirements before development starts

Basic understanding of frontend and backend development

Experience managing website builds, maintenance tasks and bug fixing workflows



Salary / Hiring Process

Salary is up to $2,000 per month depending on experience. Shortlisted applicants will be invited to interview and complete a paid test.

title: Client Success Coordinator
description:
POSITION SUMMARY

The Client Success Coordinator supports client onboarding and Client engagement within the 10X Business Academy. This role helps ensure clients and their teams stay on track with their learning programs by monitoring participation, coordinating touchpoints, and maintaining accurate client records. The Coordinator works closely with the Client Success Manager to identify engagement risks early, maintain proactive communication, and contribute to strong client satisfaction and retention.



ABOUT CARDONE VENTURES

Our mission is to help business owners achieve their personal, professional, and financial goals through the growth of their businesses. We work in dozens of verticals and provide strategic business guidance through courses, live events, partnerships, and investments. Our core values are the backbone of our business and guide our hiring process: we are inspirational, accountable, transparent, disciplined, aligned, and results-oriented. This company operates nationally and is growing by the day.



Wondering what it's like to work here? Come check this:


/watch?v=PIIv7sYj1Ns



SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE:

• Clients remain actively engaged in programs with strong participation and course completion.

• Client questions and requests are addressed quickly and professionally.

• Engagement data and client records are accurate, organized, and consistently updated.



OBJECTIVES

• Support onboarding of new clients by coordinating kickoff activities and tracking setup completion.

• Monitor Client engagement metrics such as participation, attendance, and course progress.

• Conduct scheduled check-ins and follow-up communication with clients.

• Maintain accurate client records in CRM and learning platforms.

• Identify disengagement risks early and escalate them to the Client Success Manager.

• Prepare engagement summaries and progress reports for leadership review.

• Coordinate scheduling for kickoff calls, accountability sessions, and coaching meetings.

• Assist with renewal preparation by compiling engagement insights and participation data.

• Performs other related duties as assigned.



COMPETENCIES

• Strong written and verbal communication skills in English.

• Organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple tasks simultaneously.

• Professional and client-focused approach to communication and service.

• Ability to track engagement data and recognize participation trends.

• Strong time management and follow-through on commitments.

• Comfortable working with CRM systems, learning platforms, and productivity tools.

• Ability to work independently while collaborating with a remote team.



EDUCATION AND EXPERIENCE

• Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Communications, Education, or a related field preferred.

• 1–3 years of experience in customer service, account coordination, BPO, or client-facing roles.

• Experience working with global clients or remote teams is a plus.

• Familiarity with CRM systems or online learning platforms is preferred.



PHYSICAL REQUIREMENTS

• Prolonged periods sitting at a desk and working on a computer



COMMITMENT TO DIVERSITY

As an equal opportunity employer committed to meeting the needs of a multigenerational and multicultural workforce, Cardone Ventures recognizes that a diverse staff, reflective of our community, is an integral and welcome part of a successful and ethical business. We hire local talent at all levels regardless of race, color, religion, age, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, or disability, and actively foster inclusion in all forms both within our company and across interactions with clients, candidates, and partners.



If this position caught your eye, send us your resume! For best consideration, please complete the online application form:


/

title: 3D Interactive Artist: 50-Asset
description:
Project Overview:



I am looking for a skilled 3D Artist (Blender/Spline specialist) to create a library of 50 interactive 3D assets for a new e-commerce website. The core product is a Candy Pouch, boxes, tubs and Jars some with a transparent window and a dynamic "Candy Fall" physics animation.

The Scope of Work:

• Phase 1: Master Modeling. Create 10 unique Master 3D Models (templates) based on different pouch shapes and sizes. These must include realistic crinkle textures and a high-quality transparent window (using Refraction/Transmission).

• Phase 2: Physics Animation. Set up a "Candy Fall" simulation where 3-5 Project Overview:

I am looking for a skilled 3D Artist (Blender/Spline specialist) to create a library of 50 interactive 3D assets for a new e-commerce website. The core product is a Candy Pouch with a transparent window and a dynamic "Candy Fall" physics animation.

The Scope of Work:

• Phase 1: Master Modeling. Create 10 unique Master 3D Models (templates) based on different pouch shapes and sizes. These must include realistic crinkle textures and a high-quality transparent window (using Refraction/Transmission).

• Phase 2: Physics Animation. Set up a "Candy Fall" simulation where 3-5 stylized candies fall from the top of the scene and settle realistically inside the pouch.

• Phase 3: Batch Production. Create 40 variations by swapping 2D labels (which I will provide) and candy colors onto the 10 master templates.

• Phase 4: Virtual Photography. Render 3 high-res static "Hero Shots" for each of the 50 designs (Front, Side, 45-degree angle).

Technical Requirements (Mandatory):

• Formats: Final delivery must be in .GLB (glTF 2.0) or Spline Scene format.

title: Google SEO Specialist — Men's Supplement Brand (High Bonus Potential)
description:
We are Novair Health — a six-figure/month DTC supplement brand selling Debloat, 

the first men's facial debloating and jawline definition supplement. We sell to 

a specific demographic: young men aged 18–35 who are lean, gym-trained, deep in 

fitness culture, and obsessed with optimizing their appearance.



We are hiring a full-time Google SEO Specialist. This is NOT a Google Ads role. 

Paid search experience is irrelevant here. We need someone who lives and breathes 

organic search and can connect every single piece of their work directly to 

revenue — not just traffic, not just rankings, not just clicks. Revenue.



Our previous SEO hire delivered reports full of traffic numbers and ranking 

updates with zero revenue attribution. That is not acceptable and it will not 

happen again. If you cannot show us how your SEO work has directly generated 

revenue for ecommerce brands, do not apply.



We already have strong organic traffic with high conversion rates. The foundation 

exists. What we need is someone precise, technical, and obsessed with perfection.



This is a full-time position (40 hours/week) with flexible hours. You will be 

required to track your time using a time tracker of your choice from day one. 

No exceptions. All communication is done exclusively through 
. If you are 

not on 
 or are not comfortable using it as your primary communication 

platform, do not apply.



Base pay is $3/hour. Top performers receive significant performance bonuses tied 

directly to revenue growth from organic search. We pay well for people who move 

the needle. We part ways quickly with people who don't.



We will provide all necessary tools including Claude AI, Freepik, and any other 

software required to do the job at a high level. You focus on the work.



——————————————————————————



IMMEDIATE PRIORITIES:



- When users search "Novair Health" on Google, dropdown results are surfacing 

  collection pages and internal pages that customers are not supposed to see — 

  incomplete pages, unoptimized pages, and pages that destroy brand trust on 

  first impression. This needs to be resolved immediately

- Full technical SEO audit and cleanup across our Shopify store

- On-page optimization to capture high-intent search traffic from our target 

  demographic

- Building a content and keyword strategy grounded in how young men actually 

  search for debloating, jawline definition, and facial aesthetics solutions



——————————————————————————



YOU MUST HAVE ALL OF THE FOLLOWING:



- Ecommerce SEO experience specifically — DTC brands and Shopify stores. If your 

  portfolio is SaaS, agencies, local businesses, or service companies, do not apply

- Proven revenue attribution from your SEO work — you must show us the organic 

  traffic you drove, the pages you optimized, and the actual revenue those pages 

  generated. Conversion metrics are mandatory. Clicks and impressions alone will 

  get your application deleted

- Shopify SEO competency — collections, product pages, canonical tags, 

  index/noindex control, metafields, crawl budget management

- Technical SEO skills — you can identify and fix crawl issues, manage Google 

  Search Console with confidence, and control exactly what appears in branded 

  search results and site links

- Understanding of how young male consumers search for supplements and 

  looksmaxxing solutions — keyword research grounded in real purchase intent, 

  not just search volume

- Experience with any time tracking software



——————————————————————————



AUTOMATIC DISQUALIFIERS — DO NOT APPLY IF:



- Your SEO experience is in non-ecommerce verticals

- You cannot provide revenue and conversion data from past SEO work — traffic 

  and rankings alone are not results

- You have no Shopify-specific experience

- You cannot explain how to control which pages appear in Google's branded 

  search dropdowns and site links

- You have never used a time tracker

- You are not on 
 or unwilling to use it as your primary communication 

  platform



——————————————————————————



TO APPLY, YOU MUST ANSWER ALL OF THE FOLLOWING IN YOUR APPLICATION.

Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.



Q1. Give us one specific example of ecommerce SEO work you have done. What was 

the brand, what did you do, what was the before and after in organic traffic, 

and most importantly — what was the revenue impact? Give us conversion metrics, 

not just click data.



Q2. When a user searches a brand name on Google and the dropdown results show 

collection pages or internal pages the brand does not want customers seeing, 

what is causing this and how do you fix it? Walk us through the exact solution.



Q3. We sell a men's supplement targeting facial debloating and jawline definition 

to 18–35 year old males in the fitness and looksmaxxing space. What are the top 

5 high-intent keywords you would target first and why?



Q4. We have strong existing organic traffic with high conversion rates. What is 

the first thing you audit to make sure we are not leaving revenue on the table?



Q5. What does your monthly reporting look like? Walk us through exactly what 

metrics you report and how you connect SEO activity directly to revenue — not 

impressions, not clicks, revenue.



Q6. What time tracking software have you used and for how long?



——————————————————————————



If you read all of this and you meet every requirement — we want to hear from you. 

This role has real bonus upside for someone who can demonstrably grow our organic 

revenue. We are not looking for someone to send us weekly ranking reports. We are 

looking for someone who treats organic search as a revenue channel and can prove 

they have done it before.

title: Google Ads Specialist — Men's Supplement Brand (High Bonus Potential)
description:
We are Novair Health — a six-figure/month DTC supplement brand selling Debloat, 

the first men's facial debloating and jawline definition supplement. We sell to 

a specific demographic: young men aged 18–35 who are lean, gym-trained, deep in 

fitness culture, and obsessed with optimizing their appearance.



We are hiring a full-time Google Ads Specialist. This is NOT an SEO role. 

Organic search experience is irrelevant here. We need someone who has built and 

scaled paid search campaigns for ecommerce brands and can prove it with hard 

numbers — ROAS, revenue generated, conversion rates, and cost per purchase. 

Not impressions. Not clicks. Revenue.



We have not launched Google Ads yet. This means you will be building our entire 

paid search presence from scratch. We are not looking for someone to optimize 

what someone else built. We need someone who can architect a full account, launch 

it correctly the first time, and scale it into a reliable revenue channel.



This is a full-time position (40 hours/week) with flexible hours. You will be 

required to track your time using a time tracker of your choice from day one. 

No exceptions. All communication is done exclusively through 
. If you are 

not on 
 or are not comfortable using it as your primary communication 

platform, do not apply.



Base pay is $3/hour. Top performers receive significant performance bonuses tied 

directly to revenue and ROAS generated from campaigns you manage. The better 

your campaigns perform, the more you earn. We pay well for people who deliver. 

We part ways quickly with people who don't.



We will provide all necessary tools including Claude AI, Freepik, and any other 

software required to do the job at a high level. You focus on the work.



——————————————————————————



WHAT YOU WILL BUILD AND MANAGE:



- Full Google Ads account build from zero — campaign structure, ad groups, 

  keyword mapping, match types, and negative keyword strategy

- Search campaigns targeting high-intent buyers searching for debloating, 

  jawline definition, and men's supplement solutions

- Shopping campaigns for our product catalog

- Performance Max strategy where appropriate

- Ongoing bid management, budget optimization, and creative testing

- Clear reporting that connects every dollar spent to revenue generated — 

  no vanity metrics, no fluff



——————————————————————————



YOU MUST HAVE ALL OF THE FOLLOWING:



- Google Ads experience for ecommerce brands specifically — DTC brands and 

  supplement brands strongly preferred. If your portfolio is lead generation, 

  local businesses, or service companies, do not apply

- Hard proof of results — you must provide campaigns you have managed with 

  real numbers: monthly ad spend, ROAS achieved, and revenue generated. 

  No numbers, no interview

- Ability to build a Google Ads account from scratch — not just optimize 

  what someone else built

- Deep understanding of keyword intent tiers and how to structure campaigns 

  around commercial and transactional intent for a supplement product

- Experience with negative keyword strategy — you understand how much money 

  is wasted without it and you know how to build it properly

- Google Ads certification is expected as a baseline, not a differentiator

- Experience with any time tracking software



——————————————————————————



AUTOMATIC DISQUALIFIERS — DO NOT APPLY IF:



- Your Google Ads experience is in non-ecommerce verticals

- You cannot provide ROAS and revenue numbers from past campaigns

- You have only optimized existing accounts and never built one from zero

- You confuse Google Ads with Google SEO — these are completely different 

  disciplines and we treat them as such

- You make revenue promises before auditing our offer, our store, and our 

  audience

- You have never used a time tracker

- You are not on 
 or unwilling to use it as your primary communication 

  platform



——————————————————————————



TO APPLY, YOU MUST ANSWER ALL OF THE FOLLOWING IN YOUR APPLICATION.

Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.



Q1. Tell us about a Google Ads account you built or managed for an ecommerce 

brand. What was the product, what was the monthly ad spend, what ROAS did you 

achieve, and what revenue did you generate? Give us your strongest example.



Q2. We are starting from zero. Walk us through how you would structure our 

Google Ads account in the first 30 days — campaigns, match types, bid strategy, 

and why.



Q3. Our product targets young men searching for facial debloating, jawline 

definition, and water retention solutions. Give us 10 specific search terms you 

would target in the first 30 days and 5 you would immediately add as negatives.



Q4. What is your negative keyword strategy for a supplement brand? Why does 

this matter more than most advertisers realize?



Q5. How do you report results? Walk us through exactly what metrics you show, 

how often, and how you connect ad spend directly to revenue — not impressions, 

not clicks, revenue.



Q6. What time tracking software have you used and for how long?



——————————————————————————



If you read all of this and you meet every requirement — we want to hear from you. 

We are building our Google Ads presence from the ground up and we need someone 

who is hungry, proven, and ready to own this channel completely. The bonus 

upside for someone who scales this correctly is significant. Only apply if you 

can back everything up with numbers.

title: HR Admin
description:
We’re looking for a highly organized and detail-oriented HR Admin to own and manage our internal HR operations. This role is critical to ensuring our employee and contractor data, contracts, and onboarding processes run smoothly and reliably.

You’ll be responsible for maintaining accurate records, managing contracts end-to-end, and ensuring every tea
mber has a seamless onboarding and operational experience.



Key Responsibilities:



1. Employee Data & Directory Ownership

Maintain and manage the central employee and contractor database

Ensure all records are accurate and up to date (role, status, rate, contracts, etc.)

Track and update status changes (role changes, offboarding, rate updates)

Monitor data quality and flag missing or outdated information



2. Contract & Documentation Management

Create, manage, and store all contracts (employment, freelance, NDAs)

Handle amendments, renewals, and terminations

Ensure all documents are compliant and properly signed

Coordinate contract approvals with legal and executives

Track contract status from draft to signed and archived



3. Onboarding & Offboarding Management

Own the full onboarding process from contract acceptance to active tea
mber

Ensure all onboarding steps are completed (access, tools, documentation)

Manage onboarding checklists and coordinate with department leads

Oversee offboarding process including access removal and documentation



4. Internal HR Requests Handling

Handle day-to-day HR requests (documents, confirmations, updates)

Act as the main point of contact for HR-related operational questions

Ensure fast and reliable turnaround on requests



5. Compliance & HR Operations Support

Ensure HR processes and documentation meet legal and internal standards

Track key HR-related deadlines and requirements

Support legal and leadership with HR-related documentation and updates



Requirements:



Strong organizational and operational mindset

High attention to detail and accuracy

Ability to manage multiple workflows simultaneously

Clear communication and ownership mentality

Comfortable working with tools like Notion, Monday, Boldsign or similar systems

Experience in HR administration, operations, or similar role preferred



Nice to Have:



Experience working in fast-paced, remote teams

Familiarity with contract workflows and compliance processes

Understanding of HR systems and structured data management

Basic knowledge of automation tools (e.g. Make, Zapier) is a plus



If youre interested please fill out this form:

title: Sales & Booking Specialist
description:
***To proceed with the application process, please upload your resume into this Google form:
 and select the role.***



Role Summary

As a Sales & Booking Specialist, you are responsible for converting guest inquiries into confirmed bookings across Airbnb, VRBO, Zillow, and direct channels.



Your core objective is to maximize conversion rate, occupancy, and revenue through fast response, strong sales communication, and effective follow-up.



This is a performance-driven sales role, not just customer service. You are expected to actively guide guests through the booking process and drive results.



Work Schedule

 Standard: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM Pacific Time

 Flexibility required: occasional shifts in Philippines Standard Time based on business needs



Key Responsibilities

1. Lead Conversion & Sales



 Respond to guest inquiries across Airbnb, VRBO, Zillow, and other platforms in a timely manner

 Identify guest needs and recommend suitable properties

 Use persuasive communication to highlight property features, amenities, and location advantages

 Address objections and remove booking friction

 Proactively follow up with leads to maximize conversion



2. Revenue & Listing Performance



 Take ownership of booking performance for assigned listings

 Monitor key metrics:

 Traffic

 Inquiry volume

 Conversion rate

 Occupancy



 Identify underperforming listings and recommend improvements (pricing, photos, positioning)

 Collaborate with marketing and pricing teams on optimization strategies



3. Booking Management & Guest Coordination



 Guide guests through the booking process and ensure all information is clearly communicated

 Coordinate with internal teams (operations, cleaning, maintenance) to ensure readiness

 Maintain high response rate and fast response time

 Assist with booking modifications and guest coordination



4. Performance Tracking & Reporting



 Track and report:

 Lead volume

 Inquiry-to-booking conversion rate

 Occupancy rate

 Revenue per listing



 Provide insights and recommendations to improve booking performance



Description



Month2Month is a fast-growing hospitality and property management company focused on maximizing occupancy and delivering exceptional guest experiences.

As a  Sales & Booking Specialist, you will play a critical role in driving revenue by converting guest inquiries into confirmed bookings across multiple platforms including Airbnb, VRBO, and Zillow.

This role is highly execution-driven and performance-focused. You will work directly on the front line of our booking operations, responding to leads, guiding guests through the reservation process, and ensuring listings perform at a high level.

This is not a passive customer service role. Success in this position requires a strong sales mindset, fast response time, attention to detail, and the ability to actively follow up and close bookings.

You will work closely with cross-functional teams including operations, pricing, and marketing to continuously improve listing performance and maximize occupancy.



Required Qualifications



 Bachelor’s degree or above

 Experience in property management, short-term rental, hospitality, or related industry

 Fluent in English with strong written communication skills

 Strong sales mindset with ability to convert leads into bookings

 Ability to multitask and manage multiple inquiries simultaneously

 Strong sense of urgency and responsiveness

 Comfortable working in a fast-paced, performance-driven environment

 Basic proficiency with spreadsheets and digital tools



Preferred Qualifications

 2+ years of experience in short-term rental, OTA platforms, or sales roles

 Experience with Airbnb, VRBO, Zillow, or similar platforms

 Proven track record in lead conversion or sales performance

 Familiarity with PMS systems and booking workflows

 Ability to analyze listing performance and identify improvement opportunities

 Experience working with remote and cross-functional teams



***To proceed with the application process, please upload your resume into this Google form:
 and select the role.***

title: Business Development Representative
description:
Sales Associate - Outbound & Growth



Mission: Hunt, engage, and convert D2C brands into long-term clients for

QuickAds' AI-powered managed creative services.



???? About QuickAds.ai QuickAds.ai is an AI-powered platform transforming the

way D2C brands in fashion, beauty, and personal care scale their marketing. We

help brands create, optimize, and scale ads faster and smarter. Backed by leaders

from Google, Meta, and Kae Capital and profitable from Day 1. We're growing

fast.



We need a sharp, creative Sales Associate who doesn't wait for leads to come in.

Someone who finds the right brands, opens doors in unexpected ways, and turns

conversations into clients.



What You'll Own

Lead Generation - Your Most Important Job

Your pipeline starts with you. You'll build systems to find leads, qualify them, and

keep them flowing. That means going beyond the obvious.

? Identify mid-size D2C brands and relevant decision makers worth pursuing.

? Build targeted prospect lists and constantly refresh your pipeline with fresh, relevant leads.



Multi-Channel Outreach

? Run personalized cold
 and calling campaigns that actually get replies- no templates, no spray-and-pray.

? Engage prospects on LinkedIn with thoughtful, value-first messaging and content interaction.

? Explore unconventional channels like DMs on Instagram, voice notes, Loom videos, engaging with brand content and more to stand out

? Build sequences and follow-up cadences that feel human, not automated.



Qualification & Conversion

? Run sharp discovery calls to uncover pain points around ad creative, spend efficiency, and scaling.

? Qualify leads based on brand size, ad spend, growth stage, and decision-maker access.

? Demonstrate QuickAds' value clearly and move prospects through the funnel to close.



Pipeline & Performance

? Own your CRM and lead list - keep it clean, updated, and actionable.

? Track outreach metrics, reply rates, meeting conversions, and revenue targets.

? Report weekly on what's working, what's not, and how you're iterating.



You're a Fit If You...

? Have 2–4 years in outbound sales - agency, SaaS, or selling to D2C/e- commerce brands preferred.

? Love the hunt - finding the right brand, the right contact, and the right angle excites you.

? Write exceptionally well and know how to make a cold
 feel like it was written just for that one person.

? Think beyond
 - you've booked meetings via LinkedIn, Instagram DMs, or approaches most people haven't tried.

? Are self-directed, metrics-driven, and thrive without a script.



What You'll Get

? Above-market salary + aggressive performance incentives.

? Full ownership of your outreach strategy, pipeline, and client relationships.

? Direct access to leadership and a fast feedback loop - no bureaucracy.

? The chance to shape sales at a high-growth, AI-first company disrupting how brands do creative at scale.

title: Ultra Long Form Video Editor For Sleep Channels
description:
Looking for video editors who specialize in ultra long form sleep videos.



Length per video: 2 hours with only first 5 minutes edited



Here are some examples of the editing style we're looking for:



1. youtu.be/kSC5WDgbbAg?si=hkDuKUnZ5BJzLhut

What we expect from you:



* Experience with long form content creation



* A basic understanding of how to properly create curiosity, cliffhangers, and excellent storytelling structure throughout each video with the right sound design and clip selection.



* 4 videos each week to start, potential for a full-time position, and 20-30 videos each week later. We're building a network, so this could turn into a very long-term position.

* Communication and professionalism. We have deadlines to meet, but we want to hire someone who can be honest about unrealistic deadlines or potentially missing a deadline.



* Passion for or previous experience with sleep videos is a bonus.



Budget: 10$ per video (5$ per hour as one video takes 2 hours at most to create)



If you are a serious applicant, please attach a portfolio or proof of relevant work in the past. Also apply only if you have good internet connection and pc to render long videos

If it’s a match, we will ask you for a short sample to verify and see your skills in action

title: DTC Email Designer
description:

- Create landing page visuals, banners,

title: Ads Specialist
description:
We’re hiring a full-time Media Buyer to own our paid advertising performance across platforms, with a primary focus on Meta 
 & Instagram Ads). This role is full-time and in-house (remote), so please only apply if you’re looking for a long-term permanent position. We're not hiring freelance or agency. 



This role is ideal for someone who is data-driven, detail-oriented, and excited to work closely with creatives to improve ad performance through clear insights and testing.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

- Launch, manage, and optimize ad campaigns primarily on Meta Ads. Support campaigns on Google, TikTok, or other platforms where relevant.

- Plan and execute structured tests (angles, creatives, offers, landing page) to improve cost per acquisition and ROAS.

- Manage budgets, audiences, and campaign structures based on performance

- Analyze ad performance to identify winning and underperforming ads

- Communicate clear performance insights to the creative team

- Participate in brainstorming sessions to improve creatives based on data

- Analyze Shopify sales data to identify scaling opportunities, conversion bottlenecks and product-level performance

- Monitor competitors’ ads, offers, and campaigns to identify gaps or opportunities in our market niche.

- Stay up-to-date with DTC industry trends and platform updates to ensure best practices.

- Providing administrative support, as and when needed to the manager.



Requirements

- Full-time, Monday–Friday (9am–5pm PH time)

- Remote position

- Strong comfort working with numbers and data

- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills; able to interpret data to make informed decisions

- Able to explain performance clearly to non-technical teammates

- Highly organized, self-directed, execution-focused, and able to work independently

- Willing to learn quickly and adapt as the business grows

- No prior media buying experience required, but you must be sharp, analytical, and able to learn fast.



Nice To Have (but not required):

- Experience running Meta Ads

- Experience with Shopify analytics

- Familiarity with Google Ads, TikTok Ads

- Experience in DTC or performance marketing

title: HR Recruiter / Hiring Manager
description:
We’re looking for an HR Recruiter who fully owns the recruitment pipeline end-to-end. Your job is not just to hire people, but to build a system that consistently attracts, filters, and converts high-quality talent.

You will combine hands-on recruiting with building scalable systems (ATS, questionnaires, automation) to ensure we only spend time on top-tier candidates.



Key Responsibilities:



1. Recruitment Pipeline Ownership

Manage the entire hiring funnel across all roles

Maintain clear visibility on candidate status, notes, and scoring

Ensure smooth progression from application to hire

Continuously improve conversion rates across each stage



2. Questionnaire-Based Screening

Build structured questionnaires per role (e.g. via Monday or similar tools)

Ensure candidates are pre-qualified before interviews

Continuously refine questions based on hiring outcomes



3. Interview Process Management

Conduct first-round interviews

Ensure only high-quality candidates move forward

Create clear summaries for leadership:

Coordinate second-round approvals with leadership



4. Job Posting & Sourcing Optimization

Own job postings across all platforms

Identify and optimize best-performing sourcing channels per role

Build and maintain databases

Proactively source candidates when needed



5. Systems & Automation (Critical)

You are responsible for building a scalable hiring machine, not just hiring manually.

Implement and manage ATS (Applicant Tracking System)

Build candidate dashboards (status, notes, scoring)

Continuously reduce manual work in the hiring process through automations



6. Cross-Team Alignment

Work closely with department leads to understand hiring needs

Ensure role requirements are clearly defined before sourcing

Do monthly check-ins with department heads to:

Identify bottlenecks

Spot underperformance

Adjust hiring priorities



Ideal Candidate:



Strong experience in recruiting (preferably high-volume or startup environments)

Highly structured and process-driven

Comfortable building systems and workflows (not just executing tasks)

Strong communication and judgment in candidate evaluation

Proactive and ownership-driven mindset



If youre interested please fill out this form:

title: Marketing Specialist
description:
About Us

Month2Month is a fast-growing hospitality and property management company focused on maximizing occupancy, optimizing listing performance, and delivering exceptional guest experiences across all platforms.





Role Summary

As an Omnichannel Marketing Specialist, you are responsible for maximizing the visibility, search ranking, and click-through performance of property listings across Airbnb, VRBO, Zillow, ShowMojo, and MLS.



Your core objective is to drive traffic ? improve ranking ? increase click-through rate ? support occupancy growth.



You will operate as the digital merchandiser of our portfolio, using data-driven strategies, platform algorithms, and visual optimization to improve listing performance and minimize vacancy.



This is a highly execution-driven role, not a branding or social media position.



Key Responsibilities



1. Omnichannel Listing Optimization & Merchandising



 Continuously audit and optimize listings across Airbnb, VRBO, Zillow, ShowMojo, and MLS

 Ensure 100% listing coverage for:

 All vacant homes

 Homes becoming vacant within ?7 day

 Select and sequence the top 5 listing photos to maximize CTR:

 Focus on bright living areas and bedrooms

 Build a strong visual “story” for first impression

 Apply standardized cover image badges to improve click-through performance

 Create and relaunch listings for underperforming properties:



 Ensure accurate policies (pet rules, smoking, utility caps, tenant requirements)

 Maintain consistency across platforms



2. Cross-Channel Pricing & Promotion Strategy

 Execute pricing strategies across channels:

 Airbnb / VRBO ? seasonal and demand-based pricing

 Zillow / Direct ? competitive long-term positioning

 Apply targeted discount rules to stimulate traffic and bookings

 Support long-term (3+ months) pricing and promotion strategies

 Manage “Urgent Homes” portfolio:

 Daily optimization (pricing, photos, titles, positioning)

 Focus on traffic recovery and vacancy reduction



3. Data Analysis & Performance Optimization



 Track key funnel metrics daily:

 First Page Impressions

 Listing Views

 Click-Through Rate (CTR)



 Identify underperforming listings and take corrective actions



 Continuously test and iterate:

 Photo order

 Pricing adjustments

 Listing content



4. Reporting & Insights



 Submit a Daily Performance Report including:

 Traffic and listing performance

 Lead volume across channels

 Key actions taken and results

 Provide insights and recommendations to improve listing performance and occupancy



Description



Month2Month is a performance-driven organization where listing visibility and traffic directly impact occupancy and revenue.

As an Omnichannel Marketing Specialist, you will play a critical role in managing and optimizing how our properties are presented across all platforms.

This is not a traditional marketing role focused on branding or social media. Instead, it is a hands-on execution role focused on platform algorithms, listing performance, and measurable results.

You will be expected to take ownership of listing performance, proactively identify opportunities, and continuously improve metrics such as impressions, CTR, and traffic.



We are looking for someone who is detail-oriented, data-driven, and highly responsive, with the ability to execute quickly and consistently.



Required Qualifications



 Bachelor’s degree or above

 Experience in property management, short-term rental, hospitality, or related industry

 Strong attention to detail and execution ability

 Data-driven mindset with ability to interpret performance metrics

 Ability to manage multiple listings simultaneously

 Strong sense of urgency and ownership

 Comfortable working in a fast-paced, performance-driven environment



Preferred Qualifications



 Experience with Airbnb, VRBO, Zillow, or similar platforms

 Understanding of platform ranking algorithms and listing optimization

 Familiarity with AI tools for:

 Listing content generation

 Workflow automation

 Basic design skills (Canva, Photoshop) for image enhancement and badges

 Experience with A/B testing or performance optimization

title: Real Estate Virtual Assistant (Land Investing & Lead Generation)
description:
**Title:**

Real Estate Virtual Assistant (Land Investing – Data & Lead Generation)



**Description:**

We are a growing real estate investment business focused on buying and selling vacant land in the United States (PA, WV, AL, TN).



We are looking for a **detail-oriented Virtual Assistant** to help us find and organize land deals. This is a long-term position with opportunity for growth as the business scales.



If you are organized, reliable, and good with data, this could turn into a stable, long-term role.



---



**Responsibilities:**



* Pull vacant land property lists using tools like PropStream

* Clean and organize data (remove duplicates, filter bad records)

* Research property values using Zillow, Redfin, and county websites

* Assist with lead generation (mail, text, or
 campaigns)

* Track and update leads in spreadsheets or CRM

* Follow clear step-by-step processes



---



**Requirements:**



* Strong attention to detail (VERY important)

* Experience with spreadsheets (Google Sheets / Excel)

* Good written English

* Ability to follow instructions and processes

* Reliable internet connection

* Able to work independently



---



**Nice to Have (Not Required):**



* Real estate or land investing experience

* Experience with PropStream or similar tools

* Experience with lead generation or data scraping



---



**Work Schedule:**



* Part-time to start (10–20 hours per week)

* Opportunity to increase hours based on performance



---



**Pay:**



* Based on experience ($4–$8/hour to start)

* Opportunity for raises and bonuses based on performance



---



**How to Apply:**



To apply, please follow these steps EXACTLY:



1. Start your application with the word: **“LAND”**

2. Tell us about your experience with data or real estate (if any)

3. What tools have you used before? (Excel, Google Sheets, etc.)

4. Why would you be a good fit for this role?

5. What is your internet speed?



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



---



We are looking for someone long-term who can grow with the business. If you are reliable and do great work, this role will expand over time.

title: Credit Repair Specialist
description:
We’re looking for an experienced credit repair professional who knows how to achieve fast, verifiable results using the latest legal dispute methods. You’ll handle client credit reports, identify inaccuracies, and communicate directly with credit bureaus, creditors, and collection agencies.



Key Responsibilities



Review credit reports (Experian, Equifax, TransUnion) to identify errors or unverifiable items.



Draft and submit dispute letters that comply with U.S. federal and state laws (FCRA, FDCPA, etc.).



Track disputes and follow up to ensure timely resolution.



Stay up to date with evolving credit industry practices and innovative but fully legal deletion techniques.



Provide regular progress reports to management and clients.



Qualifications



Proven experience in U.S. credit repair or credit dispute processing (2+ years preferred).



Strong understanding of FCRA, FDCPA, and related U.S. consumer credit laws.



Exceptional written English and attention to detail.



Familiarity with popular credit repair tools/software (e.g., DisputeFox, Credit Repair Cloud, Client Dispute Manager).



Organized, proactive, and results-focused.



Preferred Skills



Knowledge of advanced dispute tactics and recent industry developments.



Ability to coach clients on credit-building strategies.



Experience handling multiple client accounts simultaneously.



Perks & Benefits



Competitive pay based on experience.



Flexible remote work schedule.



Opportunity to grow with a U.S.-based company.

title: Freight Dispatcher | Remote | US Logistics | Immediate Start
description:
We are looking for an experienced Freight Dispatcher to manage daily trucking operations, coordinate drivers, and ensure efficient delivery of loads across the US.



This role is ideal for someone with strong experience in dry van and reefer operations who can operate in a fast-paced logistics environment and take ownership of dispatch performance.



*Key Responsibilities:

- Dispatch drivers and assign loads in a timely and efficient manner

- Track shipments from pickup to delivery and provide real-time updates

- Communicate with drivers to ensure adherence to schedules and resolve issues on the road

- Coordinate with brokers, carriers, and customers to ensure smooth operations

- Optimize routes to reduce costs and improve delivery times

- Maintain accurate records of loads, routes, and driver logs

- Handle delays, breakdowns, and scheduling changes effectively



*Requirements:

- Minimum 5 years of experience in freight dispatching (dry vans and reefers)

- Strong knowledge of transportation and logistics operations

- Excellent communication and problem-solving skills

- Ability to multitask and work in a fast-paced environment

- Experience working with TMS (Transportation Management Systems)

- Strong organizational and time-management skills



*Preferred Qualifications:

- Experience working with load boards and freight brokerage platforms

- Knowledge of DOT regulations and safety standards

title: Instagram Social Media Manager — Men's Supplement Brand (High Bonus Potential)
description:
We are Novair Health — a six-figure/month DTC supplement brand selling Debloat, 

the first men's facial debloating and jawline definition supplement. We sell to 

a specific demographic: young men aged 18–35 who are lean, gym-trained, deep in 

fitness culture, and obsessed with optimizing their appearance. We know our 

customer. We know our numbers. We move fast.



We are hiring a full-time Instagram Social Media Manager — organic only. This is 

NOT a paid ads role. If your background is primarily paid social, do not apply.



This is a full-time position (40 hours/week) with flexible hours. You will be 

required to track your time using a time tracker of your choice from day one. 

No exceptions. All communication is done exclusively through 
. If you are 

not on 
 or are not comfortable using it as your primary communication 

platform, do not apply.



Base pay is $3/hour. Top performers receive significant performance bonuses tied 

to measurable outcomes — engagement growth, follower growth, content quality, 

and consistency. We pay well for people who produce. We part ways quickly with 

people who don't.



We will provide all necessary tools including Claude AI, Freepik, and any other 

software required to do the job at a high level. You focus on the work.



——————————————————————————



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



- Create and post Instagram Stories daily

- Build and maintain organized Instagram Highlights

- Create static posts and carousel content

- Edit and post organic Instagram Reels (Instagram-native — NOT CapCut templates, 

  NOT YouTube-style edits, NOT generic reposts)

- Manage and respond to Instagram DMs professionally

- Monitor and delete hate comments and false accusations on our ad posts 

  (customers accusing us of being a scam, fraudulent, or a copy of another brand) 

  — this must be done quickly and consistently



——————————————————————————



YOU MUST HAVE ALL OF THE FOLLOWING:



- Proven experience managing Instagram for at least one ecommerce brand — not 

  a personal account, not a local business, an actual product-based ecommerce brand

- The ability to show us accounts you managed with before/after follower counts 

  and engagement data — no proof, no interview

- Experience creating Instagram Reels specifically — you understand hooks, 

  retention, and what makes someone stop scrolling on Instagram

- Graphic design competency — you can create clean, on-brand visual assets 

  without being given a template for every single post

- Basic video editing skills for short-form Instagram content

- Strong written English — you will be writing captions, responding to DMs, 

  and representing our brand publicly

- Experience with any time tracking software

- Understanding of the men's fitness, supplement, and self-improvement space — 

  you need to understand who our customer is and what content resonates with him



——————————————————————————



AUTOMATIC DISQUALIFIERS — DO NOT APPLY IF:



- Your Instagram experience is only from personal accounts or non-ecom businesses

- You cannot show us real accounts you managed with real metrics

- Your reels look like CapCut templates or generic reposts

- Your written English is poor

- You have never used a time tracker

- You are not on 
 or unwilling to use it as your primary communication platform

- You do not understand the men's fitness or supplement space



——————————————————————————



TO APPLY, YOU MUST ANSWER ALL OF THE FOLLOWING IN YOUR APPLICATION.

Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.



Q1. List 2–3 Instagram accounts you managed for ecommerce brands. Give us the 

handle, the follower count when you started, the current or final follower count, 

and which content formats performed best.



Q2. Send links or examples of Reels you have created. We need to see that you 

understand Instagram-native short-form content.



Q3. Our brand sells to young men who are lean, go to the gym 5x a week, and are 

frustrated that their face looks bloated despite having a great body. Describe 

the content strategy you would build for our Instagram in the first 30 days. 

Be specific — post types, cadence, tone, content angles.



Q4. A customer comments on one of our ads: "This brand is a scam and a fake copy 

of [competitor]. Don't buy from these fraudsters." Walk us through exactly what 

you do.



Q5. What AI tools have you used in a content workflow? Give us a real example — 

walk us through how you used AI to produce a specific piece of content.



Q6. What time tracking software have you used and for how long?



——————————————————————————



If you read all of this and you meet every requirement — we want to hear from you. 

This role has real bonus upside for someone who is serious, consistent, and 

produces results. We are not looking for someone to fill a seat. We are looking 

for someone who owns the role.

 or unwilling to use it as your primary communication 

  platform



——————————————————————————



TO APPLY, YOU MUST ANSWER ALL OF THE FOLLOWING IN YOUR APPLICATION.

Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.



Q1. Send us 2–3 paid ad video examples you have edited for ecommerce brands. 

For each, tell us: the product, the platform, and at least one performance metric 

(ROAS, CTR, CPP, or conversion rate). No metrics, no review.



Q2. Walk us through how you would build a paid video ad for Debloat targeting a 

22-year-old male who is lean but has a bloated, undefined face. What is the hook? 

What is the structure? What is the CTA? Be specific.



Q3. How do you identify winning organic content on TikTok or similar platforms 

and adapt it into a paid ad? What tools do you use?



Q4. What AI video tools are you currently using? Give us a specific example of 

how you used AI to produce or enhance a video ad.



Q5. What is your editing turnaround time for a 30-second ad creative from raw 

footage to final deliverable?



Q6. What time tracking software have you used and for how long?



——————————————————————————



If you read all of this and you meet every requirement — we want to hear from you. 

This role has real bonus upside for someone who consistently produces winning 

creatives. We are not looking for someone to fill a seat. We are looking for 

someone who treats every edit like it has money riding on it — because it does.

title: Executive Assistant to CEO
description:
Position Overview: 



As the Executive Assistant to the CEO, you will play a pivotal role in ensuring the smooth and efficient functioning of the executive office. Your primary responsibility will be to provide comprehensive administrative support to the CEO, managing their schedule, and coordinating various tasks to enhance productivity. Your ability to maintain confidentiality, exercise sound judgment, and proactively handle administrative duties will contribute to the overall effectiveness of the CEO's office. 



 

Pay Range: $8 per hour with a performance review scheduled after 90 days of employment. We believe in rewarding exceptional talents. 



 

About Power Plus Systems: 



Power Plus Systems LLC has been a dominant force in the residential electrical contracting industry for two decades, and we continue to lead the way. Our vision is to successfully wire 28,000 homes to completion by the year 2029, ensuring safe and efficient electrical solutions, thereby making a positive impact on the lives of our customers and communities. At Power Plus Systems, LLC, a position with us isn't just a job; it's an opportunity to grow and develop within a company that genuinely appreciates your contributions and dedication to our shared mission. 



 

Objectives: 

• Manage and organize the CEO's daily schedule, including meetings, appointments, and travel arrangements.

• Act as a gatekeeper, screening and prioritizing communications to the CEO.

• Coordinate and facilitate communication between the CEO and internal/external stakeholders.

• Anticipate the CEO's needs and proactively handle tasks to ensure optimal time management.

• Coordinate special projects and initiatives as assigned by the CEO.



 

Competencies: 

• Exceptional organizational and multitasking skills, with keen attention to detail.

• Strong written and verbal communication skills.

• Ability to maintain confidentiality and exercise discretion in handling sensitive information.

• Proficient in using Microsoft Office and Google Suites.

• Familiarity with scheduling software; experience with additional productivity tools is an advantage.

• Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to interact effectively with individuals at all levels.

• Proactive problem solver and resourceful thinker.



 

Equipment Requirements:  

• Must own a reliable computer or laptop capable of handling administrative tasks efficiently.

• Must own and actively use an iPhone and/or MacBook or Mac computer for efficient communication and task management.

• High-speed internet connection to support video calls, cloud-based collaboration, and remote work.



 

Physical Requirements: 

• Extended periods of sitting at a desk and working on a computer.

 

Benefits: 

• Growth opportunities in a well-established company.

• Ongoing training and professional development opportunities.

• Opportunity for advancement within the company.

• A supportive and collaborative work environment.

• Company-observed paid United States holidays (full time).

• Paid vacation.





How to Apply: 



If you are ready to join Power Plus Systems, LLC, a well-established residential electrical contractor that values its tea
mbers and offers excellent benefits, please submit your application through the link below. 




/internationalcareers



Power Plus Systems, LLC is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes applicants from all backgrounds to apply. 



Join us at Power Plus Systems, LLC, and be part of our continued success as we embark on the next 20 years of excellence in residential electrical contracting!

title: VA and Operations Manager for Systems, Notion, Linear, Slack
description:
We are a fast moving AI and marketing software company that needs a detail first operator to build order from chaos. You will own our internal systems in Notion, Linear, and Slack, create simple playbooks, and ship automations that reduce manual work. If you love cleaning messy workflows, documenting the source of truth, and closing loops across teams, this will be a great fit.



What you will do

• Run daily ops in Notion, Linear, and Slack; keep tasks, sprints, and docs current

• Build and maintain SOPs that are clear, short, and searchable

• Set up and monitor automations in n8n and Zapier; remove busywork across tools

• Track team KPIs and publish a weekly scorecard in Notion

• Create project dashboards and status updates; chase blockers until resolved

• Own onboarding checklists for new hires and contractors

• Calendar and meeting support; take action notes and ensure follow through

• Light data hygiene in Google Sheets; exports from tools such as Stripe or PostHog

• Vendor and tool admin; manage access, renewals, and permissions



Key outcomes and KPIs

• All tasks and projects are current and tagged by owner and due date

• Weekly ops scorecard published every Monday before 10:00 UK time

• At least three meaningful automations shipped per month that save real hours

• Cycle time from task created to task done reduced by 25 percent in three months

• Zero missed communications for critical threads in Slack and

• SOP library reaches coverage of the top 20 recurring workflows in 60 days



Skills and experience

• Strong Notion workspace design and database relations

• Linear project setup and sprint hygiene

• Slack channel structure and notification rules

• n8n required or a similar tool with a willingness to move into n8n

• Zapier, Google Workspace, basic spreadsheet formulas

• Excellent written English; crisp status updates and documentation

• Proactive, persistent, calm under pressure; loves closing loops

title: Marketing Specialist
description:
Location: Remote

Hours: Full-time, with 2–4 hours overlap with US CST





About Us



We operate a portfolio of technology businesses including an IT consulting firm serving medical/dental practices, a gaming studio (Bitrograde), and several experimental and arbitrage ventures. We prioritize measurable results over vanity metrics and expect marketing decisions to be driven by data, testing, and clear performance analysis.





Core Responsibilities



Analytics, Metrics & Performance Tracking (Core Focus)

Own marketing analytics across all brands and channels

Track, analyze, and report on KPIs including traffic, conversions, CAC, ROAS, CTR, and engagement

Set up and maintain Google Analytics, Google Tag Manager, Google Search Console, and
/Meta analytics

Ensure accurate conversion tracking for ads, forms, and key user actions

Identify trends, anomalies, and optimization opportunities based on data

Produce clear, actionable performance reports for leadership



SEO & Website Performance

Manage on-page SEO for multiple websites

Conduct keyword research and competitor analysis

Optimize content, metadata, site structure, and internal linking

Monitor search performance using Google Search Console

Track rankings, organic traffic growth, and conversion performance

Collaborate with web teams to improve site speed, UX, and SEO health





Paid Advertising 
 & Google Ads)

Plan, execute, and optimize
 and Google Ads campaigns

Monitor spend, ROAS, and conversion quality

A/B test creatives, copy, audiences, and landing pages

Diagnose underperforming campaigns and make data-driven adjustments

Ensure ad analytics align with on-site behavior and conversions





IT Services, Bitrograde & Arbitrage Marketing

Execute marketing campaigns for IT services, Bitrograde, and arbitrage projects

Measure performance across channels and initiatives

Track campaign-level profitability and attribution

Support product launches, promotions, and experiments

Quickly iterate based on performance data





Guerrilla & Experimental Marketing

title: Bookkeeper/Financial Analyst - Multi-Entity Operations
description:
Location: Remote 

Hours: Full-time, with 2-4 hours overlap with US CST





About Us



We operate a portfolio of technology businesses including an IT consulting firm serving medical/dental practices, a gaming studio, and other ventures. We're transitioning to ERPNext for our accounting operations and need a detail-oriented financial professional to own our bookkeeping and reporting functions across multiple entities.





Core Responsibilities



Daily/Weekly Operations



Reconcile bank statements across multiple business entities

Categorize and track all expenses with detailed spend analysis

Process and record transactions in ERPNext

Maintain clean separation between multiple LLCs and business units

Perform month-end close procedures



Monthly Invoicing & Collections



Generate and send all client invoices on the 1st of every month

Track invoice aging and follow up on overdue accounts

Manage accounts receivable and collection efforts

Coordinate with the operations team on billable services/hours

Maintain customer billing information and terms



Inventory Management



Maintain inventory levels in ERPNext

Monitor inventory costs and usage patterns

Coordinate with the team on reorder points

Track inventory across multiple locations/projects



Financial Reporting



Generate monthly P&L statements for each entity 

Create cost center analysis (e.g., "What is the company costing us monthly?")

Develop profitability reports by business line

Prepare management reports showing cash flow and burn rates

Track project-level profitability for client engagements



Tax Preparation Support



Prepare quarterly federal tax estimate calculations

Prepare state tax estimate calculations (Nebraska primarily)

Organize documentation for CPA review and filing

Maintain tax calendar and ensure deadlines are tracked



Business Intelligence



Identify spending patterns and cost-saving opportunities

Track KPIs across business units

Answer ad-hoc questions like "How much are we spending on software subscriptions?"

Create financial dashboards in ERPNext



Required Qualifications



Must-Haves



3+ years bookkeeping experience with US companies

Experience with multi-entity accounting

Strong understanding of US GAAP

Experience with recurring monthly billing/invoicing

Proficiency in bank reconciliation and financial statement preparation

Experience preparing documentation for US quarterly taxes

Advanced Excel/spreadsheet skills

Excellent written English communication

Available for calls during US business hours as needed



Strongly Preferred



ERPNext experience (or similar ERP systems like Odoo, NetSuite, SAP)

Experience with technology/IT services companies

Inventory management experience

Cost accounting or management accounting background

Experience with project-based profitability tracking

Familiarity with US payroll systems (we use ADP)

Experience with gaming or software development accounting



Technical Requirements



Stable internet connection (must be reliable for 1st of month invoicing)

Comfortable learning new software quickly

Experience with cloud-based accounting tools

Ability to work independently with minimal supervision

Detail-oriented with strong organizational skills



What Success Looks Like



All invoices sent by noon CST on the 1st of every month (no exceptions)

Month-end books closed within 3 business days

Quarterly tax packages ready 2 weeks before deadlines

AR aging kept under 30 days average

Inventory counts are accurate and updated weekly

Management has real-time visibility into financial performance

Clean audit trail for all transactions

Proactive identification of financial insights, not just reporting



Growth Opportunities





This role has significant growth potential. As we scale from 16 to 30+ employees, this position could evolve into a Financial Operations Manager role with broader responsibilities and team management opportunities.





To Apply



Upload your resume highlighting US client experience here: 



Message us: 

A brief note explaining your experience with multi-entity accounting

Your experience with monthly billing cycles and inventory management

Your monthly salary expectation in USD

Your time zone and hours of availability

Important: In your application, describe a time when you identified a significant cost-saving opportunity through financial analysis



Applications without US company experience or the cost-saving example will not be considered.





Note: We value honesty and continuous learning. If you don't know something, we expect you to say so and learn it, rather than pretend expertise you don't have. We invest heavily in training the right people.

title: Brand Manager - Pet Brand
description:
Blinkie Pets is a premium Philippine pet care brand. Founded in 2023 by three sisters, we've built our brand from the ground up — products, identity, community — and we're just getting started. We're expanding beyond grooming into a full pet lifestyle brand, and we need a Brand Manager who can grow with us.



The role



You'll be the guardian and driver of the Blinkie brand — making sure everything we put out is consistent, intentional, and on the level of a premium label. You'll work directly with the founders and brief the creative team, not just execute tasks.



What you'll own



Brand consistency across all touchpoints — social, packaging, campaigns, collabs

Content strategy: plan what we post, why we post it, and what story it tells

Brief the video editor and social media team so creative output stays on-brand

Identify and execute brand partnerships, influencer collabs, and PR opportunities

Develop campaign concepts for product launches and brand 
nts

Monitor how the brand is being perceived — track sentiment, comments, community feedback

Help shape the brand's expansion strategy into apparel, grooming services, and beyond

You're the one if you



Have 2–4 years of experience in brand management, marketing, or brand strategy

Can look at any piece of content and immediately know if it's on or off-brand

Think in systems — you don't just make things look nice, you build brand logic

Have experience briefing or managing creatives (you lead, they execute)

Understand the Philippine consumer market, especially the lifestyle/premium space

Can balance big-picture brand thinking with day-to-day execution

Are an excellent writer — brand voice, captions, briefs, decks

Bonus points if you have



Experience with a consumer brand in beauty, lifestyle, or FMCG

A background in or genuine love for the pet industry

Worked in a startup or founder-led environment before

Network in the influencer or content creator space

What working here looks like



100% remote — coordinate via 
 and Zoom

You'll work closely with the three founders, not layers of management

Fast-moving, decisions get made quickly

You'll have real ownership — this isn't a support role

Opportunity to grow as the brand grows

To apply: Send your resume, a portfolio or deck of brand work you're proud of, and a short note (3–5 sentences max) on a local brand you think is doing branding right — and why. To 
 Subject line: Brand Manager – [Your Name].

title: Business Development Manager / Operations Architect (KPI & Team Building)
description:
Job Title: Business Development & Operations Architect (KPIs + Hiring + Systems)

The Mission:

We are a growing company with a clear vision, but we need a System Builder to create the internal engine. I am looking for a right-hand person who doesn’t just "manage" tasks but designs the organizational structure, sets the metrics for success, and hires the talent to execute it.



Your Core Responsibilities:

KPI Management: Define, implement, and track Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) for every department to ensure accountability.



Talent Acquisition: Identify gaps in our team, write job descriptions, and lead the recruitment process to hire A-players.



SOP Creation: Build a library of Standard Operating Procedures so the business can run without constant supervision.



Who You Are:



You have a proven track record of building company structures or scaling departments.



You are data-driven—you believe that if it’s not measured, it’s not managed.



You are an expert recruiter who can spot talent and culture-fit from a mile away.



You have high-level English skills and a "builder" mentality (you find solutions, not excuses).



?? PRE-INTERVIEW TEST (Follow these steps or your application will be ignored):

Competitive salary based on experience and results.
