title: ACCOUNTING ADMIN VA - PART-TIME TO FULL-TIME | AU CLIENT
description:
JOB DESCRIPTION



OPENING STATEMENT



We are looking for an Accounting Admin VA to join a busy accounting business. You will report to two owners who manage a growing client base, and they need a reliable, detail-focused VA to take the full administrative load off their plates so they can focus on client work.



This role covers the full scope of day-to-day practice administration: managing client records across multiple systems, onboarding new clients, issuing and following up invoices, handling correspondence, organising digital files, scheduling meetings, preparing engagement letters, and keeping lodgement tracking up to date in practice management software.



If you have worked in accounting administration, professional services admin, document management, or a similar compliance-adjacent support role - and you can point to a track record of completing tasks accurately and without needing to be followed up - we want to hear from you.



---



WHAT WE OFFER



* Part-time, 20 hours per week (Wednesday to Friday) with a strong possibility of moving to full-time within 3-6 months

* Stable, long-term role with an established Australian business

* Fully remote - work from home

* Training provided on all firm-specific systems

* 13th month pay and government benefits (SSS, PhilHealth, Pag-IBIG)

* PHP 21,250 + PHP 750 benefits per month after probation (part-time)

* PHP 33,500 + PHP 1,500 benefits per month when moving to full-time



---



WHAT YOU'LL DO



* Keep client details accurate and consistent across multiple systems - XPM, FYI Docs, CAS360, and others

* Manage the administration side of onboarding new clients - collecting documents, preparing engagement letters, filing everything correctly

* Issue invoices on instruction at end of month and follow up on any that go unpaid

* Manage the shared
 inbox - read, categorise, respond to straightforward requests, and escalate anything involving accounting or compliance to the relevant accountant

* Maintain and organise digital client files in FYI Docs

* Chase clients for outstanding documents and information at the start of each month

* Schedule meetings and manage staff calendars

* Prepare standard documents and engagement letters using LightYear Docs (LYD)

* Keep lodgement tracking up to date in Xero Practice Manager (XPM)



---



REQUIREMENTS



* Strong working knowledge of the full Microsoft 365 suite - Word, Excel, Outlook, and Teams - with real examples of using these tools in a professional setting

* Perfect written English - the role involves preparing and sending client-facing correspondence and documentation

* Reliable internet with a named, tested backup connection - you must be able to describe your fallback option specifically

* High accuracy and attention to detail - errors in client records, invoices, or documents have real consequences

* Strong follow-through - once a task is assigned, it is expected to be completed without reminders

* Availability during Australian business hours (AEST/AEDT), Wednesday to Friday

* Reliable computer and internet connection



---



NICE TO HAVE



* Prior experience working in or supporting an Australian accounting firm

* Experience with Xero Practice Manager (XPM)

* Experience with CAS360, FYI Docs, or LightYear Docs

* Experience handling client-facing correspondence in a professional services environment



---



SCHEDULE



* Part-time, 20 hours per week

* Wednesday, Thursday, Friday (approximately 6-7 hours per day) - some flexibility on structure available

* Australian business hours (AEST/AEDT)



---



CLOSING



This role suits someone who takes ownership of their responsibilities, works accurately without being supervised, and is looking for a stable long-term position with a growing Australian firm. If that describes you, apply now.

title: Facebook Manager
description:
We're a fast-moving direct-response advertising operation running paid Meta campaigns across multiple international markets. We test hard, move fast, and hold a high bar for execution. We're looking for a
 Ads Manager to own the day-to-day of our ad operations — someone who actually knows what they're looking at inside Meta and doesn't need to be babysat.

What you'll be doing:

Monitoring ad performance and flagging anything that needs attention — rejected ads, budget issues, delivery drops

Analyzing campaign stats and reporting key metrics to the team in a clear, timely way

Alerting the team immediately when ads are rejected and coordinating the fix

Working with management to request new profiles and ad accounts when needed, and keeping track of account health

Staying on top of any platform policy changes or account flags before they become a bigger problem



Who you are:



You've run Meta ad accounts before — not just "boosted posts," actual campaign management with multiple objectives, ad sets, and creative variables

You're comfortable reading data and know the difference between a performance problem and a delivery problem

You're detail-oriented and proactive — if something looks off, you say something without waiting to be asked

You can manage multiple accounts simultaneously without dropping the ball

You communicate clearly and don't overcomplicate your updates



Nice to have:



Experience working with direct-response or e-commerce brands

Familiarity with running ads across international markets

Comfort with ad account structures at scale (multiple BMs, proxies, etc.)

title: Video Editor
description:
My team and I are looking for a hardworking, disciplined, and focused tea
mber to join our 7-figure eCommerce dropshipping business team. EXACTLY WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING We provide existing winning ad videos, You cover existing captions with the translated language (e.g. English, Hebrew, German, Dutch) You replace the existing ad voiceover with the translated equivalent, Transcribe the voiceover using a tool we give you, then use AI voiceover to generate and insert the translation Swap out 2-3 short clips in the ad to make it slightly different (you’ll get these clips from other videos we provide) Make sure everything looks seamless - clean, aesthetic, professional
 ads that are native to the country / market the ads are being used in. Follow our detailed SOPs - every step explained WE PROVIDE EVERYTHING YOU NEED 
/Capcut for editing AI Transcriber software, Eleven Labs for voiceovers WORKLOAD & GROWTH Each video is on average around 30-40 seconds We launch at least 1 product per day Each product has 3 ad videos So your daily output will be 3 videos total (3 per market - same structure, just translated) Each ad takes max 20 to 30 minutes to edit. You will be working a minimum of around 3 hours per day. Once you’re fully familiar with our system (usually within a couple of weeks), we’ll scale up. 



WHO THIS IS FOR This is a long-term position - 8 months + , multiple years. We’re not looking for short-term help. If you’re looking to make a small amount, this isn’t for you. But if you’re disciplined, reliable, and take pride in doing excellent work, you’ll thrive here. We want someone who’s not just looking for a task, but for a place to build something meaningful - someone who values structure, feedback, and growth. We’ll give you clear expectations, consistent work, and everything you need to succeed. What we expect in return is simple: Show up. Deliver great work. Improve over time. If that excites you, you’re exactly who we want on the team. HOW TO APPLY Send a message with: Your experience/examples with video editing and
 ad creatives Your other past job experience Your availability - how many hours per day and per week Include the secret phrase “READY2BUILD” in your message so we know you read this. Show us you’re serious, and we’ll give you everything you need to succeed.

title: Video Editor (PHP 358/HR - USD $6/HR | PART Time)
description:
Hey!



We are looking for a Video Editor ROCKSTAR who will turn our long form content into high-performing short form clips and weekly YouTube videos.



We are a marketing and education company that works with English speakers and already have a team of high-performing individuals from the Philippines. Mastery of the English language is a requirement and will be tested prior to hiring.



BENEFITS INCLUDE:

- 100% remote

- Weekly pay

- USD $6 / Hour = 350 PHP / Hour

- Paid training

- No work during the weekends

- Opportunity to go from part time to full time

- We pay for the AI and creative tools you will use (Adobe, Descript, Opus Clip, Canva Pro)

- Grow with a team that values initiative, speed, and high standards



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



Short form (main focus):

- Take long form content (webinars, trainings, YouTube videos, podcasts) and turn it into short form clips for Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn

- Add attention-grabbing hooks, captions, emojis, B-roll, overlays, and pattern interrupts

- Create short testimonial videos from coaching calls, client interviews, and other raw footage

- Organize and manage video assets so clips are easy to find and reuse



Long form & channel support:

- Edit 1 piece of long form content per week (highlight key 
nts, add B-roll, overlays, and graphics)

- Publish that long form video on YouTube (upload, title, description, tags, end screens, cards)

- Create and upload custom YouTube thumbnails that drive clicks

- Handle one-off editing requests as needed (simple promos, clips, intros/outros, etc.)

- Analyze performance of published videos in YouTube Studio (CTR, views, watch time, retention) and provide simple reports and recommendations



Collaboration & cadence:

- Meet once a week with the owner of the company for feedback, direction, and priorities

- Join 1 monthly content planning session with the team

- Use AI tools (that we pay for) to speed up editing, transcription, captioning, and repurposing while still polishing by hand



Expected volume (part-time ~20 hours per week):

- 20–30 finished short form clips per week (30–90 seconds each)

- 1 edited and published long form YouTube video per week

- Ongoing testimonial edits and one-off requests as needed



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR:



Experience & portfolio:

- Proven experience editing short form content from long form videos

- Strong portfolio showing:

Before/after edits from long form to short form

YouTube videos you have edited and thumbnails you have designed

Short testimonial / social proof videos (a plus)



Tool competence (we provide licenses):

You will work daily inside:

- Adobe Premiere Pro (primary editor)

- Basic Adobe After Effects (simple animations, lower thirds, transitions)

- Descript (transcription, rough cuts, repurposing)

- Opus Clip (AI clipping & short-form ideas)

- Canva Pro (YouTube thumbnails & simple graphics)

- YouTube Studio (publishing & analytics)

- Google Drive, Google Docs/Sheets (file management, tracking)

- ClickUp (task management)

- Slack (communication)



You don’t need to be a master of every tool on day one, but you must already be strong in at least one pro editor (Premiere / Final Cut / DaVinci) and be able to learn the rest quickly.

Having experience with video editing is a requirement to be considered for this role.

We will ask you what your favorite dog breed is, answer chowchow in your application so we know you have read the full job posting.

We will start with relatively limited hours (around 20 hours per week to begin) with the opportunity for it to grow as our relationship develops.



REQUIREMENTS:

- Mastery of the English language (spoken and written)

- Strong project management skills and ability to hit volume targets consistently

- Comfortable reviewing analytics and making basic performance recommendations

- Quiet environment to work



TECH REQUIREMENTS (MINIMUM):

- Computer: Windows 10/11 PC or Mac (released within the last 4–5 years)

CPU: Intel i7 / Ryzen 7 / Apple M1 or better (or equivalent)

RAM: Minimum 16 GB (32 GB strongly preferred)

Storage: At least 512 GB SSD, with 150+ GB free for active projects

GPU: Dedicated graphics card with 4 GB VRAM or more (e.g., NVIDIA GTX 1660 / RTX series or equivalent). For Mac, M1/M2 with integrated GPU is fine.



- Software capability:

Must be able to run Adobe Premiere Pro / After Effects smoothly while having multiple Chrome tabs, cloud drives, and AI tools (Descript / Opus Clip / etc.) open.



-High Speed Internet: Stable enough for uploading/downloading large video files and live calls without interruption

Reliable backup option (mobile data or secondary ISP) is a plus



- Other:

Quality headphones and microphone for edit reviews and team calls

Quiet, dedicated workspace suitable for focused editing work



If your current setup struggles with Adobe Premiere or AI tools like Descript / Opus Clip, please upgrade first before applying. This role requires fast, reliable hardware to hit our weekly volume targets.



SCHEDULE:

You must be available to work 4 hours per day, following this schedule: 3 PM – 7 PM Philippines time.



You must APPLY with this link:

title: TikTok Manager – U.S. FYP Targeting Expert (Based in PH)
description:
We’re a U.S.-focused brand looking for a Philippines-based TikTok manager who has already grown TikTok accounts with a primarily U.S. audience and knows how to set them up to behave as if they are U.S.-based. 



Brand: 
 | High potency moringa to bring energy & vitality to your every day! 



About the Role:  

You will manage and grow one or more TikTok accounts that must perform as if they are based in the United States. You’ll handle the full workflow from technical setup and posting to optimization, basic community management, and reporting.



Responsibilities: 

• Set up and maintain a “U.S.-based” environment for posting (VPN, device region, time zone, language, etc.).

• Post content according to a content calendar, focused on U.S. peak times (EST/PST).

• Optimize every post for the U.S. FYP using strong hooks, captions, hashtags, and sounds that resonate with U.S. viewers.

• Research and track U.S. TikTok trends, audios, and formats, and suggest concepts to the team.

• Coordinate with our team/creators to get scripts, raw videos, and assets ready for posting.

• Handle basic community management: replying to comments, hiding spam, and escalating important messages.

• Monitor performance (views, watch time, engagement, follower growth) and send a short weekly report with key wins, losses, and action items.



Requirements:

Please only apply if you meet these:



• Proven experience managing TikTok accounts that grew a mainly U.S. audience (share links and screenshots if possible).



• Hands-on experience posting from outside the U.S. while making the account behave as if U.S.-based (VPN, region, time zone, etc.).



• Strong understanding of U.S. TikTok culture: trends, 
s, sounds, and typical audience behavior.



• Excellent written English and ability to adapt to a U.S. brand voice.



• Comfortable working with schedules aligned to U.S. posting times (e.g., early morning or late evening PH time).



• Reliable internet connection and a dedicated device you can use consistently for this role.



Nice to Have:

• Experience working with e-commerce, DTC brands, or TikTok Shop targeting U.S. customers.

• Experience coordinating with UGC creators, editors, and media buyers.

• Basic knowledge of TikTok Ads Manager and paid campaigns to U.S. audiences.



Work Setup & Hours:

• Position: Part-time or full-time (please state your preference).

• Location: Remote, Philippines only.

• Working hours: Flexible, but you must reliably post during agreed U.S. time windows and attend occasional alignment calls.



How to Apply 



Please send:



1. Links to 2–3 TikTok accounts you have managed, with a short note on your role for each.

2. Proof or description that the audience is primarily U.S.-based (analytics screenshots or a brief explanation).

title: Medical & Legal Document Organizer (Evidence & Timeline Specialist)
description:
Overview:  

We are seeking a highly detail-oriented professional to review, organize, and extract key information fro
dical and legal records to prepare for court cases for two individuals.



Scope of Work:  

- Review scanned and physical documents (medical + legal)  

- Identify and extract relevant findings, diagnoses, and events  

- Organize documents into structured categories:

  - Medical history timeline  

  - Environmental exposure evidence  

  - Legal/landlord documentation  

- Create a clear, chronological summary of events  

- Flag key issues for medical and/or legal follow-up  



Deliverables:  

- Clean timeline (2012–Present)  

- Categorized document folders  

- Summary report highlighting key findings  

- List of missing or recommended documents  



Ideal Candidate:  

- Experience in medical records review and/or paralegal work  

- Strong attention to detail  

- Ability to summarize complex information clearly  

- Familiarity with U.S. legal or healthcare systems preferred  



Hours:  

Part-time (10–20 hours total to start)

Phase 1: 10-hour project to organize and summarize initial documents



Goal:  

Build a clear case file to support medical evaluation and potential legal review.

title: Support Specialist
description:
IMPORTANT NOTE: EXPERIENCE SUPPORTING EDUCATIONAL TECHNOLOGY PLATFORMS IS HIGHLY PREFERRED.



STEPS TO APPLY:

• PUT “TIME” IN THE SUBJECT LINE

• WRITE A SHORT COVER LETTER INTRODUCING YOURSELF

• SHARE A LINK TO YOUR UPDATED CV OR RESUME



WE WILL ONLY REVIEW APPLICATIONS THAT INCLUDE A LINK TO A CV OR RESUME.





About the Role

We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Support Specialist who will serve as the first point of contact for customers needing assistance with navigating the app, troubleshooting issues, or understanding how the system works.



Your responsibilities will include handling day-to-day inquiries, coordinating with implementation managers during onboarding, and helping improve the overall user experience by identifying recurring issues and feedback trends.



As the platform continues to grow, your insights will help improve our support processes and contribute to ongoing product enhancements.

 

What You’ll Do

-Work closely with our implementation team during onboarding and setup

-Test new features or product updates and flag potential issues before they impact customers

-Help maintain and improve support resources such as help articles, guides, and internal documentation

-Respond to support tickets and assist users with platform navigation, feature inquiries, login/access issues, and basic troubleshooting

-Escalate more complex technical issues to the appropriate internal team when needed

-Track and categorize incoming requests to help identify patterns, recurring issues, and improvement opportunities



What We’re Looking For

-Excellent English communication skills: written, spoken, and verbal (MUST) 

-Proven experience in customer support, technical support, or a similar role (MUST)

-Experience providing customer or technical support to schools, educational institutions, or EdTech platforms (ADVANTAGE)

-Experience using help desk or ticketing systems (ADVANTAGE)

-Strong problem-solving skills and a proactive approach to finding answers and documenting solutions

-Highly organized and comfortable handling multiple tickets, updates, and tasks without missing details

-Analytical mindset with the ability to identify patterns and trends in support requests

-Team-oriented with the ability to collaborate effectively with product, operations, and support teams

-Comfortable working in a fast-paced, growing company environment

-Passion for education and a genuine interest in helping schools operate more effectively

 

Work Setup

-This is a full-time job in a permanent work-from-home setup

-You will work 8 hours a day, 5 days a week

title: Operations Manager & HR Partner (The "Right Hand" to CEO)
description:
I am looking for a high-level Operations Manager / HR Partner in the Philippines to take full ownership of my business results. I am not looking for a Virtual Assistant who waits for instructions. I need a leader who brings solutions, manages the team, and ensures that every hire adds value to the company.



You will be the bridge between my vision and the team's execution. Your goal is to free up my time so I can focus on big-picture growth while you handle the day-to-day operations and team performance.



Your Core Responsibilities:



Team Leadership & HR: Recruit, onboard, and manage a team (including Sourcing and Communications managers). You will track their KPIs and ensure they are productive.



Operations & Supply Chain: Oversee the Alibaba sourcing process. Ensure quality control, negotiate better terms with suppliers, and manage procurement timelines.



Project Management: Drive the development of e-commerce projects, website content updates, and the creation of professional product catalogs.



Strategic Reporting: Provide weekly reports on business performance, team efficiency, and project status.



Required Qualifications:



Proven experience as an Operations Manager, Project Manager, or Team Lead.



Deep understanding of Alibaba sourcing and supply chain management.



Experience in E-commerce (website content management, catalog creation, digital sales flow).



Expert level in project management tools (Asana, ClickUp, or Trello).



Ability to make decisions independently and "manage up" (tell me what needs to be done, don't just ask).



Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal).



Why Work With Us?



Long-term, stable full-time position.



Performance-based bonuses (We reward results, not just hours).



Direct communication with the CEO.



Opportunity to help build and scale a business from the ground up.





HOW TO APPLY (Follow these instructions strictly):



Change the subject line of your application to: "I am the Leader you need for Aromika.



Briefly describe a situation where you managed a team and solved a major problem without the owner’s help.



Include a link to your Loom video (max 2 minutes) introducing yourself and explaining why you are an "A-Player" Manager, not just a VA.

title: Strategic Alibaba Sourcing & Procurement Specialist
description:
We are looking for an experienced Sourcing & Procurement Specialist to handle our supply chain operations on Alibaba. Your main goal is to find the best manufacturers, negotiate the best possible terms, and ensure that every product that leaves China meets our high-quality standards.



You will report directly to our Operations Manager and work closely with the CEO.



Your Core Responsibilities:



Supplier Vetting: Identify and verify manufacturers on Alibaba (avoiding trading companies/middlemen).



Negotiation: Negotiate pricing, MOQs (Minimum Order Quantities), and payment terms (aiming for 30/70 splits via Trade Assurance).



Sample Management: Coordinate sample production and shipping to ensure they meet specifications.



Quality Control: Arrange third-party inspections and ensure all production issues are fixed before final payment.



Logistics Coordination: Work with freight forwarders to ensure timely delivery and correct documentation.



Required Qualifications:



Min 2-3 years of experience specifically in Alibaba sourcing for international markets.



Expertise in Trade Assurance, Incoterms (EXW, FOB, DDP), and factory audits.



Deep understanding of Quality Control (QC) processes.



Strong negotiation skills – you must be comfortable pushing back on suppliers to get better deals.



Highly organized with a "never trust, always verify" mindset.



Why Work With Us?



Stable, long-term full-time role.



Professional growth within a scaling e-commerce business.



Clear management structure (you will have a dedicated Operations Manager to support you).



HOW TO APPLY:



Change the subject line of your application to: "Master Sourcing Agent for Aromika".



List 3 specific "Red Flags" you look for when checking a new supplier's Alibaba profile.



Explain your process for handling a situation where a batch of 500 units has a 10?fect rate during inspection.



Include a link to your Loom video (max 2 minutes) explaining your biggest sourcing "win" (how you saved money or improved quality).

title: E-commerce Communication Manager (Content, Catalogs & Growth)
description:
We are looking for a creative and detail-oriented Communication Manager to bridge the gap between our products and our customers. Your mission is to take the product information from our sourcing team and transform it into professional catalogs, high-converting website content, and clear brand communication.



You will report to the Operations Manager and ensure that our brand looks premium and professional across all platforms.



Your Core Responsibilities:



Content Creation: Write compelling product descriptions that sell. No generic text – we need benefits-driven copy.



Catalog Management: Design and update professional B2B/B2C catalogs (using Canva, Adobe, or similar tools).



E-commerce Development: Manage and update website content (Shopify, WooCommerce, or similar), ensuring all listings are optimized and visually appealing.



Asset Coordination: Work with the Sourcing Specialist to get high-quality product photos and videos. If the quality is low, you must provide feedback and creative direction.



Brand Voice: Ensure all communications 
s, newsletters, website) are consistent and professional.



Required Qualifications:



Excellent English: Near-native written English is a must. You should be able to write persuasively.



Design Skills: Experience with Canva is mandatory. Experience with Adobe Suite (Photoshop/InDesign) is a huge plus.



E-commerce Experience: You have previously managed product listings and website content.



Visual Eye: You can tell the difference between a "good" and a "great" product photo.



Organization: Ability to manage multiple product lines and deadlines simultaneously.



Why Work With Us?



Long-term, full-time career opportunity.



A chance to shape the visual identity of a growing brand.



Supportive management and a clear workflow.



HOW TO APPLY:



Change the subject line of your application to: "Creative Communicator for Aromika".



Include a link to your Portfolio (Catalogs you have designed or Websites you have managed). Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.



Include a link to your Loom video (max 2 minutes) explaining your process: How do you turn a raw product photo and a list of features into a professional catalog page?



Tell us which e-commerce platform (Shopify, Magento, etc.) you are most comfortable with.

title: Ebook Designer & Copywriter — Men's Supplement Brand (High Bonus Potential)
description:
We are Novair Health — a six-figure/month DTC supplement brand selling Debloat, 

the first men's facial debloating and jawline definition supplement. We sell to 

a specific demographic: young men aged 18–35 who are lean, gym-trained, deep in 

fitness culture, and obsessed with optimizing their appearance.



This ebook is sent to hundreds of customers every single day. It is the first 

thing a customer receives before the product arrives at their door. It is their 

first real impression of our brand. A poor ebook means lost trust, refund 

requests, and chargebacks. A great ebook builds credibility, primes the customer 

for results, and turns a first-time buyer into a loyal customer.



We are not looking for someone to put together a Canva template in an afternoon. 

We are looking for someone who takes this seriously and delivers something we are 

proud to put our brand name on.



All communication is done exclusively through 
. If you are not on 
 

or are not comfortable using it as your primary communication platform, do not 

apply.



We will provide all necessary tools including Claude AI, Freepik, and any other 

software required to do the job at a high level. You focus on the work.



——————————————————————————



WHAT YOU WILL DELIVER:



- A fully redesigned and rewritten Debloat ebook — professional, premium, and 

  specifically written for our customer

- Copy that speaks directly to a 22-year-old male who is lean, goes to the gym 

  5x a week, and wakes up every morning frustrated that his face looks bloated 

  and undefined despite having a great body

- Design that looks expensive — proper typography, layout, visual hierarchy, 

  whitespace, and structure. Not Canva. Not generic. Not templated

- Content that builds trust, educates the customer on why Debloat works, and 

  gets them excited to use the product before it even arrives

- Final deliverable in PDF format, print-ready and screen-ready



——————————————————————————



YOU MUST HAVE ALL OF THE FOLLOWING:



- A portfolio of ebooks or long-form designed content pieces you have produced 

  for supplement brands or ecommerce brands — this is non-negotiable. Generic 

  ebooks, unrelated industries, or personal projects will not be considered

- Proven copywriting ability — you can write in a tone that resonates with young 

  men in the fitness and self-improvement space. Not wellness. Not corporate. 

  Not soft

- A genuine eye for premium design — you know what makes something look 

  credible and expensive versus what looks like it was put together in an hour

- Understanding of our niche: looksmaxxing, men's facial aesthetics, debloating, 

  and the frustrations of our customer. If you have never heard of looksmaxxing 

  or do not understand why a lean guy would be frustrated about his face, you 

  will not be able to write this ebook effectively

- Ability to deliver without hand-holding — you will be given the existing ebook, 

  brand context, and customer information. From there, we expect you to execute



——————————————————————————



AUTOMATIC DISQUALIFIERS — DO NOT APPLY IF:



- You cannot show us ebooks you have produced for supplement or ecommerce brands

- Your design work looks like Canva templates or generic low-effort layouts

- You have no copywriting experience for a consumer product brand

- You cannot write in a tone that resonates with young male consumers

- You do not understand the looksmaxxing, men's fitness, or supplement space

- You are not on 
 or unwilling to use it as your primary communication 

  platform



——————————————————————————



TO APPLY, YOU MUST ANSWER ALL OF THE FOLLOWING IN YOUR APPLICATION.

Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.



Q1. Send us 2–3 ebooks or long-form designed pieces you have produced for 

supplement or ecommerce brands. Provide links or attach files. If you cannot 

provide these, do not apply.



Q2. Who is our customer and what does he need to feel when he reads this ebook? 

Show us that you understand him — not a generic answer.



Q3. What is wrong with most supplement brand ebooks? Be specific about what 

makes them fail and what you would do differently.



Q4. Walk us through your process — from receiving the brief to delivering the 

final PDF. How long does a project like this take you?



Q5. What tools do you use for design and copywriting? Have you used AI tools 

in your workflow — if so, how?



——————————————————————————



This ebook goes out to hundreds of real customers every day. If you are the 

right person for this, the work will speak for itself and there is real bonus 

upside on delivery. Only apply if you can back everything up with proof.

title: 3D Civil Designer
description:
Senior Civil 3D Designer – Earthworks Modelling (Contract)

The Opportunity



We are seeking a senior Civil 3D designer with proven expertise in earthworks modelling and 3D grading to support a time-critical landfill concept design. This role suits an autonomous, senior operator who can take project-level direction and deliver accurately without supervision.



Stubbs Consultants is an independent New Zealand civil infrastructure engineering practice supporting industrial, commercial, and land development projects in operational and environmentally sensitive environments. Led by a Chartered Professional Engineer (CPEng) with over 16 years’ experience, the practice provides earthworks design, stormwater, site grading, and design management services from feasibility through to construction delivery. This is a high-trust, delivery-focused engagement.



The Project

A live project commencing mid-April requires delivery within a 3–4 week programme. The assignment involves developing a concept earthworks model for a landfill facility, including:



-Staged filling strategy

-Capacity optimisation

-Practical grading aligned with operations

-Cut/fill volume assessments



Your Role

-Working under the direction of a NZ Chartered Professional Civil Engineer (CPEng), you will:

-Translate defined engineering intent into Civil 3D models

-Develop surfaces, grading, and volume outputs

-Produce clean, structured drawings (DWG + PDF)



Inputs provided:

-Topographical survey data

-2D concept plans

-Written design brief

-Who This Suits



This role is suited to a senior Civil 3D designer who:

Has 8+ years’ experience in 3D grading, earthworks modelling, and 3D drainage

Works autonomously with minimal supervision

Can take project-level direction and execute efficiently



Not suited to graduate or intermediate-level applicants.



Engagement Model

-Contract / gig-based role

-Fixed scope initial assignment. 

-Full commitment required during delivery period



Contractor must provide own Civil 3D software and equipment



Commercials

Looking for a fixed price:

USD $1,200 – $1,800). 



Expected Hours : Typically 40–100 hours, depending on capability

Paid trial task required. USD$100



Future Opportunity

Strong performance will lead to:



-Detailed design work

-Additional projects

-Ongoing collaboration

-Example Output Requirements



Applicants must provide sample outputs demonstrating:

-Existing and proposed contour plans

-Earthworks extents and grading

-Cut/fill volume summaries

-TIN surface modelling

-Clean DWG or PDF outputs suitable for client review



Application Requirements



Please provide:

Relevant Civil 3D examples (contours + volumes)

Summary of experience

CV



Hourly rate (USD)

Availability for mid April

Confirmation of ability to complete a paid trial



Expectation

This is a delivery-critical role requiring ownership, clear communication, and the ability to meet programme deadlines without supervision.

title: Advanced Video Editor — $1,500 USD per month. Fast Pacing, Strong Storytelling, Motion Graphics (AE)
description:
Senior Long-Form YouTube Video Editor (Premiere + After Effects)



$8–$15 USD/hr | ~30 hrs/week | Remote | Long-term



We’re a remote video editing agency editing 8–20 min YouTube videos for multiple clients. We need a high-level editor who can deliver retention-focused pacing and clean, modern motion graphics.



Must have:

Advanced Premiere Pro (fast, organized timelines)

Advanced After Effects (motion design + compositing)

Strong storytelling/pacing + attention to detail

Reliable async communication + daily progress updates



Schedule (required)

Must work within 7:00 AM–6:00 PM Manila time (your choice inside the window)



How to apply

Send your best 2–3 edits, (pick ones with lots of motion graphics and demonstrate your proficiency with Premiere and After Effects), and include how many hours each edit took.



Also include your weekly availability + confirm Manila hours.



Position will first be freelance, and can progress to full time for the right editor who is able to demonstrate superb attention to detail, ability to follow directions right the first time, and demonstrates advanced editing abilities



Looking forward to  hearing from you!

title: Shopify CRO & Landing Page Specialist (Remote)
description:
Type: Independent Contractor (Full-Time or Part-Time)

Working Hours: CET Business Hours (Germany), Monday to Friday

Client Location: Munich, Germany



About the Client:

We are a high-performance marketing agency based in Munich, Germany, currently building our CRO department from scratch. We work with a diverse range of eCommerce brands—from smaller shops needing foundational trust and AOV improvements to large-scale brands doing €10M+/year where every data-driven change has a massive revenue impact.



About the Role:

We are looking for a Shopify CRO & Landing Page Optimization Specialist who thinks in revenue, not just aesthetics. We value impact over job titles; whether you are a highly-motivated Junior or a seasoned Senior, we care about your ability to explain strategy, execute tests, and move the needle on CVR and AOV.



This role is unique: You will manage client eCommerce stores, but you may also work internally on our B2B funnels (Lead magnets, VSLs, and booking pages). We want a "solution-bringer" who helps us define the tech stack and processes for this new department.



You will be responsible for:

- eCommerce CRO: Optimizing PDPs, listicles, advertorials, and checkout flows to increase Revenue per Visitor.

- B2B Optimization: Improving internal funnels for lead opt-ins and booked meetings.

- Strategic Communication: Recording clear Loom audits to explain the "why" behind your optimizations.

- Data-Driven Testing: Moving from hypothesis to test to iteration.



Must-Have Skills & Experience:

- Strong Shopify Expertise: Deep hands-on experience with the platform.

- Conversion Focus: Proven results improving CVR, AOV, or Funnel metrics.

- Psychology & Design: Understanding of buying psychology and modern Western design standards.

- Commercial Mindset: Ability to prioritize tasks based on revenue impact, not just "looking pretty."

- Tech Versatility: Experience with page builders, bundling apps, and heatmapping tools (you tell us what’s best!).



How to Apply, please complete this form:





Note: This role is NOT for "task-takers" or "app-installers." We are looking for a strategic partner to help us build a department. If you think in testing frameworks and funnel leverage, we want to meet you.

title: YouTube Content Research Assistant (Viral Video Analyst – Magic Niche)
description:
I run a fast-growing YouTube channel (100K+ subscribers) focused on visual content and performance-based videos.



I’m looking for someone who can find high-performing YouTube videos and break down WHY they work — so we can replicate winning ideas.



This is not a basic admin role.

You’ll be responsible for identifying patterns in successful content.



Your Role:



When required (typically monthly or bi-monthly), you will:



Find 30–50 high-performing YouTube videos



Analyse what makes them successful (titles, hooks, thumbnails)



Organise everything into a clear spreadsheet



Suggest improved or similar video ideas based on your findings



What You Must Deliver (Spreadsheet Columns):



Video Title



Channel Name



Subscriber Count



Views



Link



Thumbnail Screenshot



Hook Summary (Why would someone click?)



Why It Worked (1–2 sentences)



Suggested Angle (How we could improve or recreate it)



What I’m Looking For:



Strong attention to detail



Good written English



Ability to think logically and identify patterns



Interest in YouTube or content creation (preferred)



Important:



This role is about thinking, not just collecting links.



If you perform well, this can become a long-term role with more responsibility.



To Apply:



Find 3 high-performing YouTube videos



For each video, write:



Why it performed well



How you would improve or recreate it



Start your application with the word: MAGIC



Applications without this will not be considered.
